cmd: set -e echo "=== install chezmoi on spark (to ~/.local/bin) ===" sh -c "$(curl -fsLS get.chezmoi.io)" -- -b "$HOME/.local/bin" >/tmp/chezmoi-install.log 2>&1 || { echo "install script failed, trying release binary"; } export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" chezmoi --version 2>&1 | head -1 || { tail -5 /tmp/chezmoi-install.log; exit 1; } echo echo "=== scaffold ~/github/fleet-provisioning ===" mkdir -p ~/github/fleet-provisioning/{home,ansible/roles,ansible/inventory,docs} cd ~/github/fleet-provisioning && git init -q 2>/dev/null; git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree echo "scaffolded:"; find ~/github/fleet-provisioning -maxdepth 2 -type d | sed "s#$HOME/##"

export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" SRC=~/github/fleet-provisioning/home echo "=== chezmoi init (generates config; runs the Bao probe) ===" chezmoi --source "$SRC" init 2>&1 | tail -3; echo "init rc=$?" echo echo "=== per-machine facts ===" chezmoi --source "$SRC" data 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin).get("data" ,{}); print({k:d.get(k) for k in ("hostname","role","isAgentHost","baoReachable")})' echo echo "=== Linear secret renders from Bao? (redacted) ===" chezmoi --source "$SRC" cat "$HOME/.config/linear-tui/env" 2>/dev/null | awk -F= '{print $1"=<"length($2)" chars>"}' echo echo "=== dry-run apply plan (no mutation, no scripts executed) ===" chezmoi --source "$SRC" apply --dry-run --verbose 2>&1 | head -25
